plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the page URL after search navigation included a hash fragment (#playwright-check-suite) which was not accounted for in the strict equality assertion.
observedIndicators: Assertion failed after successful page.ai completion
URL mismatch only differs by a hash fragment (#playwright-check-suite)
Recent 5-run failure streak suggests a persistent application change
Baseline and failure screenshots show the correct target page is reached

remediationSteps.summary: Update URL assertion to accommodate hash fragments.
remediationSteps.details: Update the assertion on line 13 of checkly.test.ts to use .toContain() or a regex that allows for the hash fragment, or update the expected string to 'https://www.checklyhq.com/docs/constructs/playwright-check/#playwright-check-suite'.

plan.notes: The autonomous agent successfully executed the search and clicked the correct result. The failure is purely in the deterministic assertion which expects an exact URL string without the anchor fragment. The history shows a 5-run failure streak, indicating a permanent change in how the search results are linked on the website.
